_comment: STARTER EXAMPLE — Miguel's lane. The MISMATCH for Meridian Sands (the DRIFT HERO), derived from beliefs (meridian-sands.json) vs signals (meridian-events.example.json).
_status: DRAFT — Miguel refines the drift engine on top of this. This is THE wow case.
_framing: NEUTRAL: 'material change -> re-KYC needed', NOT an accusation. A human analyst decides.
_headline: Silent re-tiering: risk_score 28 (LOW) -> 82 (HIGH) over ~30 months. No single event was decisive at onboarding; the TRAJECTORY is. The scheduled review (2026-01-15) would have missed all of it.

alert.flag: Material Business-Model Change + Ownership / Geographic Drift (Silent Re-tiering)
alert.rationale: Onboarded as a UAE-only B2B SaaS analytics startup (MS1, MS2) with founder ownership (MS3), no crypto (MS4, MS5) and small flows (MS8). Public + internal signals now show: a pivot to Web3 trading infrastructure (MS-EV1), an offshore BVI entity (MS-EV2), a new 30% PEP-adjacent investor (MS-EV3), a crypto brokerage offered without FSRA authorisation (MS-EV5), flows ~12x the onboarding envelope (MS-EV6), and a co-founder named in a fraud investigation (MS-EV7). Individually borderline; together a coherent migration into a materially higher-risk profile.
alert.what_would_flip: Confirmation the crypto brokerage is within licensed scope (FSRA), the new UBO clears PEP & source-of-wealth checks, and the elevated flows fall within a revised, approved envelope.
alert.recommended_action: Pull the periodic review OFF-CYCLE (scheduled 2026-01-15 -> now); open Enhanced Due Diligence; re-tier to HIGH; re-baseline transaction-monitoring thresholds.
alert._note: Meridian is the MODEL-STRENGTH case: the signal is in the trajectory, not any single event. This is what proves the slow-structural-drift engine.
